description:
Open-source native GitLab client for Android and desktop
Gitalchemy is a free and open-source GitLab client for Android and desktop (Linux, macOS, Windows), built with Tauri v2, React, and TypeScript.

Manage your entire GitLab workflow from your phone or computer — no browser needed.

Features:
- Browse and search projects, groups, and repositories
- View, create, and comment on issues and merge requests
- Monitor CI/CD pipelines and read job logs
- Manage todos and notifications
- Personal Access Token authentication
- Works on Android and desktop (Linux, macOS, Windows)

Privacy first:
No telemetry. No ads. No tracking. Your data stays yours.

Gitalchemy is the only GitLab client available on both Android and desktop as a native app.
